title: Visible Blue Powdered Snow
description: A Resource Pack that makes Powdered snow a lot more visible than it usually is.
body:
A Resource Pack that finally makes you able to see that pesky powdered snow.
One of the only visible powdered snow packs on 1.21.10 based on my research.
Made with love and care by AncientDuc.
The pack will eventually get more versions but its still in beta.
THE PACK IS NOW AVAILABLE ON ALL VERSIONS WITH POWDERED SNOW!
Contact @ancientduc on discord for bug reports.
